content.full_text:
Ex-officio member of Coastal Commission should be in Coastal 
Commission code.

sections.question_synthetic: Whether an ex-officio member of the Coastal Commission should be included in the Coastal Commission conflict of interest code.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: An ex-officio member of the Coastal Commission should be included in the Coastal Commission code.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: Whether an ex-officio member of the Coastal Commission should be included in the Coastal Commission conflict of interest code.

CONCLUSION: An ex-officio member of the Coastal Commission should be included in the Coastal Commission code.
embedding.first_500_words: Ex-officio member of Coastal Commission should be in Coastal Commission code.
embedding.summary: FPPC advice letter addressing whether ex-officio members of the Coastal Commission should be covered under the Coastal Commission conflict of interest code. The letter advises that such members should be included in the code.
